*Initial Message Snippet:* 
*She took up her blade and searched out the one person she knew to be worthy of her touch. Perhaps they would be willing to engage her in combat, in the mutual drawing of blood, so as to earn her affections.*

*She threw the knife perfectly. She watched it sink into the soft dirt.  "Fight me."*
